Event: Mushroom Loot - December 2025
Event Date: 02/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI265
Heavenly Pirouettes Ring

The unit's attacks have a 65% chance to freeze the attack's targets for 3 sec. During this time, the frozen units can't move or attack, and the cooldown time of all their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec. If the target was already frozen when the ability triggered, the target explodes, dealing 375000 magic damage to self and all enemy units in a small radius around, and casts stiffness upon them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
